* * *

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37744239:sunhccbAN:m:1:876315805:CEA85BF04DBBE099E3C5EA74773E9820:r)

Peter,

Before my father takes the stage at 9:00 p.m. tonight to debate Hillary Clinton, I want to remind him why he signed up for this race. I want to remind him just how much is at stake.

**Which is why I want to give him a list of thousands of supporters who made a contribution in honor of our movement just hours before he takes the stage.**

[**Please contribute $100, $65, $35, $20, $15, or even $3 before 7:00 p.m. to get your name on the list of supporters I give him before he takes the stage.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37744239:sunhccbAN:m:1:876315805:CEA85BF04DBBE099E3C5EA74773E9820:r)

Because the debate begins at 9:00 p.m., I'll have to get your contribution before 7:00 p.m., so that I can get him the list in time.

By seeing your name among his most dedicated supporters, I know that he will have do everything he can to usher in a victor for our movement.

He is prepared to make you proud.

This list will boost his morale, strengthen his courage, and humble him as he takes the stage to fight for America.

That's why he launched our campaign last June: to fight for the millions of men and women who have been left voiceless in their own country.

But now is his moment to prove to all of America that he will lead us back to greatness.

[**Please make a contribution of whatever you can before 7:00 p.m. tonight, and your name will be on his most dedicated list of supporters.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37744239:sunhccbAN:m:1:876315805:CEA85BF04DBBE099E3C5EA74773E9820:r)

Thank you for your support,

Eric Trump

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37744239:sunhccbAN:m:1:876315805:CEA85BF04DBBE099E3C5EA74773E9820:r)**

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

body:
---

**My Faith Votes**
presents
[My Faith Matters LIVE: A Conversation with Eric Metaxas](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37782437:WokC23bNP:m:1:876315805:C4F682B4D4B124B8F7AEB22EE866C0A1:r)
**Host:** Megan West
**Date:** SEPT 29TH
**Time:** 8PM (ET) / 5PM (PT)
**_"__Being a Christian is less about cautiously avoiding sin than about courageously and actively doing God's will. "_** \- Eric Metaxas

Get ready for a fast paced, [interactive call](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37782437:WokC23bNP:m:1:876315805:C4F682B4D4B124B8F7AEB22EE866C0A1:r) or watch the live video stream at [My Faith Votes](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37782437:WokC23bNP:m:1:876315805:C4F682B4D4B124B8F7AEB22EE866C0A1:r) or [Facebook Live](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37782438:WokC23bNP:m:1:876315805:C4F682B4D4B124B8F7AEB22EE866C0A1:r) with Eric Metaxas who has been featured as a cultural commentator on _CNN_ , _MSNBC_ , and the _Fox News Channel_ ; and has discussed his own books on _The History Channel_ , _C-SPAN 's Book TV_, _Glenn Beck_ , _Huckabee_ , and _RedEye_. He has been featured on many radio programs, including NPR's _Morning Edition_ , and _Talk of the Nation_ , as well as _Hugh Hewitt_ , _Dennis Prager_ , _Bill Bennett_ , and _The Alan Colmes Show_.

**Eric Metaxas** is the _New York Times_ #1 bestselling author of _Bonhoeffe_[ _r_](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37782439:WokC23bNP:m:1:876315805:C4F682B4D4B124B8F7AEB22EE866C0A1:r) , _Miracles_ , _Seven Women_ , _Seven Men_ , _Amazing Grace_ , and [_If You Can Keep It: The Forgotten Promise of American Liberty_](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37782439:WokC23bNP:m:1:876315805:C4F682B4D4B124B8F7AEB22EE866C0A1:r). He is the host of the _Eric Metaxas Show_ , a nationally syndicated radio program heard in more than 120 cities around the U.S., featuring in-depth interviews with a wide variety of guests.

ABC News has called Metaxas a "photogenic, witty ambassador for faith in public life," and _The Indianapolis Star_ described him as "a Protestant version of William F. Buckley."

[Sign up now for this LIVE EVENT on THUR, SEPT 29TH 8PM (ET) / 5PM (PT)](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37782437:WokC23bNP:m:1:876315805:C4F682B4D4B124B8F7AEB22EE866C0A1:r).

**Be sure to get your cultural and political questions ready as there will be plenty of** opportunity in the live, interactive, Q&A session.

This My Faith Matters Live Event is scheduled for Thursday, September, 29TH 8PM (ET) / 5PM (PT), and is likely to be one of your favorite events in our series.

My Faith Votes exists to inspire and motivate Jesus followers to vote. We are a non-partisan movement of the Church in America. **My Faith Votes**
presents

**Topic:** Discussing the Importance of Constitution Day
**Date:** SEPT 29TH

name: Corry Bliss
subject: 4 MILLION voter contacts
body:
| Peter -- Over the weekend, our campaign surpassed four _MILLION_ voter contacts. Since May of last year, thousands of volunteers and interns have knocked on doors and made phone calls to four million targeted Ohio voters.

With 43 days until Election Day, we won't be outworked and we're taking nothing for granted. We have launched 7 coalitions and we are organized on over 30 college campuses and 200 high schools.

[](https://www.robportman.com/yard_signs?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4m_outreach&n=1)
Ohio voters have a clear choice in November between moving forward with Rob's pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs, or returning to Ted Strickland's failed policies of higher taxes, more regulations, and bigger government.

**If you would like to sign up to display a Portman for Senate yard sign,[please click here](https://www.robportman.com/yard_signs?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4m_outreach&n=2).**

The support for our campaign is tremendous -- Rob has been endorsed by the Ohio Conference of Teamsters, the Ohio Fraternal Order of Police, the United Mine Workers of America, and IUOE Local 18. We have the support of unions representing more than 100,000 hardworking Ohio families and they each previously supported Ted Strickland!

But we must keep working hard for these last two months. Thank you for everything you are doing to ensure victory in November! Sincerely, Corry Bliss [](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4m_outreach&n=3 "Donate here!") name: Carole King
subject: Need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I need your help to remind people who want change in Washington that the change we need is a Democratic Senate--not more gridlock. But we need to act now...
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20160926-King-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Friend --

I'm a Democrat because I believe our elected officials should wake up every day determined to solve the problems that keep working Americans up at night. That's what Democrats do.

**Republicans ' priorities couldn't be more different.** We remember Mitch McConnell's vow to obstruct, obstruct, obstruct until he made President Obama a one-termer. Thankfully McConnell didn't succeed with that last part -- but six years later, obstruction remains the GOP's calling card. Now they're selling themselves as "a check on Hillary Clinton," by which they mean more obstruction.

A party that puts spite over solutions has no business running the Senate.

[**That's why I'm standing with the DSCC as they fight tooth and nail for a Democratic majority. Won't you join me right now with a contribution?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20160926-King-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

I need your help to remind people who want change in Washington that the change we need is a Democratic Senate -- not more gridlock that hurts our communities.

* We need to remind them that the "party of fiscal discipline" shut down the government -- inflicting $24 billion in damage -- all to undermine health care.

body:
We have to get this over to him by 7 PM EST. Get your name on the list. |

Friend, Before my father takes the stage to face Hillary Clinton, I’ll be giving him a list of supporters who made a contribution just before the big debate. I want to remind him just how many people are invested in this movement. I want to remind him why he signed up for this fight. It will boost his morale, strengthen his courage, and humble him as he takes the stage to fight for you -- and the American people. Please contribute $100, $65, $35, $20, $15, or even $3 before 7 PM EST to get your name on the list of supporters I give him before he takes the stage. Because the debate begins at 9PM EST, I’ll have to get your contribution before 7 PM EST tonight, so that I can get him the list in time. My father is going on stage to prove to America that he can lead us back to greatness. He will be presidential, passionate, and resilient. He will make the case that Hillary Clinton represents the failures and corruption of yesterday, but that our movement will breathe new life into the American Dream, and usher in a bright new future for our country. And by seeing your name among his most dedicated supporters, I know that he will do all he can to make you proud. Please make a contribution of whatever you can before 7 PM EST tonight. Thank you for everything you’ve done, Eric Trump CONTRIBUTE $100

name: E.B.
subject: This isn't right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504d6/7be36b49/1ea67736/78f87eb0/3040052584/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend -- In just 46 days, America will hold the first presidential election in half a century that will be conducted without the full protection of the Voting Rights Act.

Since the Supreme Court gutted the Voting Rights Act in 2013, folks in many states have found their voting rights under attack from laws intended to keep people of color, students, people with disabilities, and others from the polls.

The right to vote is the foundation of our democracy, and laws that suppress that right are a direct attack on democracy. **This isn 't a partisan issue -- it's an American issue.**

We can't allow discrimination to dishonor our elections. We must join together to restore the Voting Rights Act and guarantee every citizen's right to vote.

**[Add your name to say you support a restored Voting Rights Act.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504d6/7be36b49/1ea67736/78f87eb7/3040052584/VEsE/ "https://bayh.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/all-americans-deserve-a-say-in-their-government-")**

America was founded on the principle that everyone, not just a privileged few, deserves a say in their government. It's up to us to protect the rights of our fellow voters and our fellow Americans.

**Everyone 's voice, and vote, counts. Let's fight to keep it that way.**

**[Will you stand with me to support a restored Voting Rights Act?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504d6/7be36b49/1ea67736/78f87eb7/3040052584/VEsF/ "https://bayh.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/all-americans-deserve-a-say-in-their-government-")**

Thanks,

Evan **[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504d6/7be36b49/1ea67736/78f87eb6/3040052584/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20160926&amount=25")**
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

[Unsubscribe](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504d6/7be36b49/1ea67736/78f87eb5/3040052584/VEsD/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/unsubscribe")
Contributions or gifts to the Evan Bayh Committee are not tax deductible.

name: Eric Holcomb
subject: Excellence in Education
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Last week, I introduced the first part of our Taking Indiana to the Next Level plan, which outlines the specific policies I intend to champion | | | | | [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/f5d72f3e551a4c5caa0071a9e1d0b4e4?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=862f0e002b9049698aa6ec21fca09cce&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=Image_Header_Logo&utm_term=Education&utm_campaign=GFR&utm_content=20160926-excellence-in-education-16266-petition)
---
| | | | Friend, Last week, I introduced the first part of our **Taking Indiana to the Next Level** plan, which outlines the specific policies I intend to champion once elected as your governor. **Today, I 'm excited to share with you my vision for excellence in education and workforce development to ensure a lifetime of opportunities for everyone in Indiana!** **We must responsibly expand access to early childhood education and work to promote a safe, student-driven learning environment. We must ensure every high school student is ready to enter the workforce or pursue higher education, and that every out-of-work adult can retrain and develop the skills needed to succeed in our 21st Century economy.** We can do that by taking a commonsense, conservative approach to local education reform for all. We must:
* Responsibly expand access to pre-K options for the state's most at-risk children.
* Strive to have the nation's very best K-12 education system.
* Attract and retain our very best to the teaching profession.
* Ensure a clear and affordable path to college completion.
* Strive to provide every Hoosier the career preparation, education and skills needed to succeed in our 21st century economy.

**This is such an important part of our plan because education has the power to open the doors of opportunity for every Hoosier and to keep us on the path moving forward.** **[Join us by pledging your support for strengthening our Hoosier education system and making it the best in the nation!](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/040daec1bf2c4303b9225adb204014cb?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=862f0e002b9049698aa6ec21fca09cce&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta&utm_term=Education&utm_campaign=GFR&utm_content=20160926-excellence-in-education-16266-petition)**

**[Will you chip in $5 tonight? Make sure the big political news in Indiana this weekend is that Hoosiers are coming together to defeat my opponent.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8140189690968537088/7122865623532963840?utm_campaign=fnd_sepeom_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160926_fnd_gq_sepeom_ndn_1_jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)**

| | Hi there,

I'm ready to go on that debate stage and make you proud tonight.

Not only will I hold Donald Trump accountable for his outrageous and offensive agenda, I'm going to speak up for all those he has tried to bully or silence in this campaign.

But before I step out there, I want to know that the EMILY's List community has my back.

**[If you're with me, pitch in $3 to become an official Debate Donor before tonight. 100% of your donation will go directly to my campaign.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0f28/24c69fd9/175e6422/18e8b461/1053740027/VEsE/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate-customonly/hillary-clinton?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+If+youre+with+me+pitch+in+3+to+become+an&utm_campaign=WPEFCU53N_digital_email_20160926_Hillary_n-alla&source=WPEFCU53N_digital_email_20160926_Hillary_n-alla") **

My mother taught me to never back down from a bully. And I won't back down tonight.

But given what's at stake, it would mean so much to know that you're on my team before I walk up to that podium.

body:

Friend, Did you see Eric Trump’s email? I’m going to print the list of supporters for Donald Trump at 8:50 PM EST. This is your last chance to get on the list of supporters before Mr. Trump takes the stage. Contribute now to get your name on the list. Brad Parscale Digital Director Team Trump ---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Eric Trump Date: Mon, Sep 26, 2016 at 7:02 PM Subject: Before my father takes the stage To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend, Before my father takes the stage to face Hillary Clinton, I’ll be giving him a list of supporters who made a contribution just before the big debate. I want to remind him just how many people are invested in this movement. I want to remind him why he signed up for this fight. It will boost his morale, strengthen his courage, and humble him as he takes the stage to fight for you -- and the American people. Please contribute $100, $65, $35, $20, $15, or even $3 before 7 PM EST to get your name on the list of supporters I give him before he takes the stage. Because the debate begins at 9 PM EST, I’ll have to get your contribution before 7 PM EST tonight, so that I can get him the list in time. My father is going on stage to prove to America that he can lead us back to greatness. He will be presidential, passionate, and resilient. He will make the case that Hillary Clinton represents the failures and corruption of yesterday, but that our movement will breathe new life into the American Dream, and usher in a bright new future for our country. And by seeing your name among his most dedicated supporters, I know that he will do all he can to make you proud. Please make a contribution of whatever you can before 7 PM EST tonight. Thank you for everything you’ve done, Eric Trump CONTRIBUTE $100
